coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 10:39 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 65% for 10:39. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 10:39 at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 65%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 97% for 12:47. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 97-97% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 97% for 12:47. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 5:41 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% complete. Rep 2/5. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23 minutes of work done. 41 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 29 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 29 minutes in. 97% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 97%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 41 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:41 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 59% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:41 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 12:47 at 97%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 97-97% FTP, 85-100 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 12:47 at 97%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 12:47 at 97%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 97% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 50% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
